settings.heading: दुकान, scaled.
settings.body: Ecomdukan is a bulk supplier of stationery and printer labels for D2C brands and businesses across India. We sit between the kirana-shop reliability our customers grew up with and the precision-grade output a modern fulfillment operation demands.

settings.text: Three years of running ops at D2C brands taught us one thing: nobody serves the line. Suppliers either treat you like a wholesale account (gates, MOQs, opaque pricing) or a consumer (one carton, retail-margin pricing). Neither works when you're shipping 500 orders a day.

We publish prices. We stock inventory. We GST-invoice every order. We ship same-day from three DCs. We answer WhatsApp in business hours. The combination is unremarkable in retail — and somehow rare in bulk supply.
Procurement should not be project work.
